summary: Tested Share Approved Jobs feature end-to-end. Backend: 7/7 tests passed. Frontend: all 11 scenarios verified via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Share Approved Jobs feature fully working. Public endpoint GET /api/jobs/{id}/share returns sanitized fields (no address/email/phone/lat/lng). Route /j/:jobId is public (not behind ProtectedRoute). crew1 has 2 accepted jobs with Share buttons visible. crew5 is pending — no share button. contractor1 has no share buttons. Modal share button (data-testid=modal-share-job) works for accepted crew. Apply button visible for logged-in crew on open jobs, CTA shown for anonymous users.
passed_tests: Backend: Share response includes id, title, description, pay_rate, crew_needed, crew_accepted_count, is_full, status, city, state
Backend: Share response does NOT contain address, email, phone, lat, lng, location, contractor_id
Backend: Share works for crew1 accepted job (e07dc228)
Backend: Share returns 404 for non-existent job
Frontend: Sign In button (data-testid=shared-page-login-btn) visible when not logged in
Frontend: Sign in to Apply CTA (data-testid=shared-page-signup-cta) visible when not logged in
Frontend: Job title, pay rate, city/state, description all shown on public page
Frontend: Apply button NOT shown for unauthenticated user
Frontend: Navbar shown (not Sign In header) when logged in as crew1
Frontend: Apply for This Job button (data-testid=shared-page-apply-btn) visible for logged-in crew on open job
Frontend: Fully staffed message shown when job slots are filled
Frontend: Share buttons (data-testid=share-job-{id}) visible on 2 accepted jobs for crew1 in list view
Frontend: No Share buttons for crew5 (pending only)
Frontend: modal-share-job button visible in job detail modal for accepted crew1
Frontend: No share-job-{id} buttons on contractor dashboard
